name: Brandfolder Digital Asset Management API
what_it_does: Brandfolder digital asset management REST API for marketing and creative teams to store, organize, and distribute brand assets with AI-powered auto-tagging, CDN delivery, and creative tool integration. Enables AI agents to manage asset collections and sections for brand library organization automation, handle asset upload and metadata management for asset cataloging automation, access AI-powered smart tags and auto-tagging for content discovery automation, retrieve asset search and filtering by tag, label, and custom field for content retrieval automation, manage CDN asset delivery and embed links for content distribution automation, handle asset approval and annotation workflow for creative review automation, access version history and asset tracking for asset lifecycle automation, retrieve brand portal sharing and guest access for external collaboration automation, manage custom fields and asset relationships for metadata enrichment automation, and integrate Brandfolder with Canva, Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, Widen, Shopify, and marketing platforms for end-to-end brand asset management.
use_cases: Organizing brand assets from marketing library management agents
Auto-tagging content from AI metadata generation agents
Delivering assets via CDN from content distribution agents
Sharing brand portals from external collaboration agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale DAM with complex rights management (use Widen or Bynder for enterprise)
Video production workflow (use Frame.io or Vimeo)
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise marketing team wanting AI agents to automate brand asset organization, AI-powered tagging, CDN delivery, and creative tool integration through Brandfolder's Smartsheet-backed DAM platform.
avoid_when: SMARTSHEET ACQUISITION INTEGRATION DEPTH: Brandfolder was acquired by Smartsheet in 2021; integration between Brandfolder DAM and Smartsheet project management is evolving; automated workflows spanning both platforms must verify current API integration scope; Smartsheet-Brandfolder workflow automation may have gaps between platforms. CUSTOM FIELD SCHEMA MANAGEMENT FOR AUTOMATED TAGGING: Brandfolder custom fields and labels are organization-specific configuration; automated metadata enrichment workflows must maintain custom field schema consistency; schema changes (renaming, deleting custom fields) in Brandfolder interface affect automated tagging workflows using those fields. CDN URL CACHING FOR ASSET REPLACEMENT: Brandfolder CDN delivery uses cached URLs; when assets are replaced or updated, CDN cache may serve stale version to external embeds; automated asset refresh workflows distributing CDN URLs must account for CDN cache invalidation delay for updated assets.

auth.notes: Brandfolder uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. Denver, Colorado HQ. Founded 2012 by Luke Beatty. Acquired by Smartsheet (SMAR) in 2021 for $155M. Products: DAM, brand portal, CDN delivery, AI auto-tagging, creative tool integration. Integrations: Canva, Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, Widen, Shopify, Hootsuite, HubSpot. GDPR. SOC2. Serves 500+ brands. Competes with Bynder, Canto, and Air for mid-market DAM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — demo-based sales process
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium and Enterprise tiers; custom pricing based on users and storage; annual contract
pricing.notes: Denver CO. Smartsheet subsidiary. Custom enterprise pricing. Annual contract. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; asset and search queries throttled; CDN delivery separate from API limits; webhooks for upload, approval, and asset events

known_agent_gotchas: BRANDFOLDER vs COLLECTION vs SECTION HIERARCHY: Brandfolder organizes assets in Brandfolders (top-level) → Collections → Sections; automated asset placement must specify correct hierarchy level; automated uploads to wrong level create disorganized asset library that bypasses intended brand portal structure

AI SMART TAG CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD FOR SEARCH ACCURACY: Brandfolder AI smart tags use image recognition with confidence scores; automated search workflows using AI tags must understand low-confidence tags may produce false positives; automated asset retrieval relying on AI tag match without confidence filtering returns unrelated assets for product-specific or brand-specific visual concepts

GUEST LINK EXPIRY FOR AUTOMATED DISTRIBUTION: Brandfolder guest access links can be configured with expiry; automated asset sharing workflows distributing guest links must track and refresh expiry; automated distribution of expired guest links creates access denied for external recipients

ASSET KEY vs ASSET ID IN API RESPONSES: Brandfolder API returns both asset key (alphanumeric slug) and numeric ID; some endpoints use key, others use ID; automated workflows must use consistent identifier type per endpoint; mixing keys and IDs in automated requests creates 404 errors for valid assets

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION FOR AUTOMATED INTAKE: Brandfolder webhooks include HMAC signature for authenticity verification; automated webhook intake must verify signature before processing; unverified webhook processing creates security vulnerability to spoofed upload or approval events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mid-market DAM. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Brand asset, creative, and CDN delivery data.

security_score_components.security_notes: DAM platform. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Brand asset and CDN data.
